_comment: Stage 3 sector -> Yahoo benchmark symbol map. Probed 2026-05-13: every candidate ^FTNMX* sub-index returned HTTP 404 on the anonymous chart endpoint, so this map collapses to _default. Sprint 26 (B-105): AIM stocks are handled via the is_aim override in fetch_sectors.py resolve() and backfill_ticker_meta.py — they use '^FTSC' as AIM benchmark. FTSE 100/250 membership benchmarks deferred until market_cap data is available from backfill_ticker_meta.py.
_aim_note: AIM stocks use '^FTSC' (FTSE Small Cap) as proxy — '^AIM' (FTSE AIM All-Share) was confirmed delisted on Yahoo Finance 2026-06-07. Override is applied in fetch_sectors.resolve() when is_aim=1, and by backfill_ticker_meta.py via Yahoo quoteType.exchange detection.
_ftse100_note: FTSE 100 members ('^FTSE') and FTSE 250 ('^FTMC') benchmarking deferred to Sprint 26 Phase B after market_cap_gbp is populated by backfill_ticker_meta.py.
